description: Letter addressed to Abū l-F[araj Yosef] b. Yaʿaqov al-Andalusī Ibn ʿAwkal. Written on parchment. Small fragment. Dating: 11th century. In Judaeo-Arabic, with the address partially in Arabic script. The portion of the letter preserved here refers once to Avraham Ibn al-Zarbī (cf. T-S 12.251 for this family name) and twice to "Avraham," probably the same person. Mentions "[the ship] on which he is traveling" and good wishes for everything to turn out well. AA/ASE
